name: Scientific
victoryScreenHeader: Complete all the spaceship parts to win!
victoryString: Against all odds, your faction has restored the knowledge of the ancients. From the ashes of the old world, your scientists have unlocked the secrets of space travel. A new chapter begins among the stars. The wasteland remembers your name.
defeatString: Your faction has fallen. Your settlements are empty, your people scattered to the winds. But in the wasteland, nothing truly dies. Perhaps someday, someone will find your story in the ruins and remember.

name: Cultural
victoryScreenHeader: Complete 5 policy branches and build the Utopia Project to win!
victoryString: Your settlements became beacons of hope in the wasteland. Art, music, and stories spread from your camps to every corner of the ruined world. You didn't just survive - you gave survivors a reason to live.
defeatString: Your faction has fallen. Your settlements are empty, your people scattered to the winds. But in the wasteland, nothing truly dies. Perhaps someday, someone will find your story in the ruins and remember.

name: Domination
victoryScreenHeader: Capture all enemy Capitals to win!
victoryString: The wasteland is yours. Every rival faction has fallen, every settlement flies your banner. From the ruins, a new empire rises - forged in fire and blood. Whether the world thanks you or fears you, none can deny your power.
defeatString: Your faction has fallen. Your settlements are empty, your people scattered to the winds. But in the wasteland, nothing truly dies. Perhaps someday, someone will find your story in the ruins and remember.

name: Diplomatic
victoryScreenHeader: Build the UN and be voted world leader to win!
victoryString: In a world of raiders and warlords, you chose a different path. Through alliances, trade, and cunning diplomacy, you united the factions under one council. The wasteland finally has a government again.
defeatString: Your faction has fallen. Your settlements are empty, your people scattered to the winds. But in the wasteland, nothing truly dies. Perhaps someday, someone will find your story in the ruins and remember.

name: Time
milestones: Have highest score after max turns
victoryString: The dust has settled. After generations of struggle, your faction stands tallest among the survivors. You didn't conquer the world - you outlasted it.
defeatString: Your faction has fallen. Your settlements are empty, your people scattered to the winds. But in the wasteland, nothing truly dies. Perhaps someday, someone will find your story in the ruins and remember.
